column1: # The dudal chapter search misses a few genuine codes; these come from the
# D86 is a real diagnosis (Mavesaar IKA) that maps to ICD-10. A30-X37 are the
# ICPC-1 "procesdiagnoser" (process codes 30-69, "kan anvendes"); they carry no
# ICD-10 diagnosis mapping, so they appear in the ConceptMap as 'unmatched'.
# (Note: "B12" extracted from the card is a false positive - it is the substring
#  of code B81 "Vitamin B12-/folinsyremangelanaemi", not an ICPC code.)
